name: Cut Bundle Piece
description: One cut panel/piece within a bundle. Tracks its fabric zone and nest position so shade variation can be detected.

fields.label: Piece Name
fields.description: Pattern piece label, e.g. Front Body, Back Body, Sleeve L, Waistband

fields.label: Fabric Zone
fields.description: Position on the fabric roll, e.g. A1, B3, Edge-Left, Centre. Zones with the same label are from the same area.

fields.label: Nest X (mm)
fields.description: X coordinate of piece in the nest layout (from nesting software export)

fields.label: Nest Y (mm)
fields.description: Y coordinate of piece in the nest layout

fields.label: Shade Reference
fields.description: Shade / dye-lot zone code from fabric roll inspection. Must match other pieces.

fields.label: Shade Flag
fields.description: Set automatically: Warning = piece from edge zone, Mismatch = shade_ref differs from majority

fields.label: V3 Deviation (mm)
fields.description: Max dimensional deviation flagged by V3 Cognex cut inspection
